DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT LOUIE SHOU'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ALL OBJECTIONS WAIVED. PLAINTIFF MABUTAS TO SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO ALL DISCOVERY REQUESTS AT ISSUE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTION IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $790.00, PAYABLE WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. PLAINTIFF IS REMINDED TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.7 IN REGARD TO PROVIDING COURTESY COPIES OF MOTION PAPERS TO THE COURT. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM. JUDGE PRO TEM: NOAH LEBOWITZ; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302/JRM)

calendar.matters:
Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Discovery Requests
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT LOUIE SHOU'S Motion To Compel Answers To Discovery Requests is GRANTED. No opposition filed. All objections waived. Plaintiff Mabutas to serve verified responses to all discovery requests at issue within 10 days of notice of entry of order. The request for sanction is GRANTED in the amount of $790.00, payable within 20 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiff is reminded to comply with Local Rule 2.7 in regard to providing courtesy copies of motion papers to the Court. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported.

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Discovery Requests
